title: Kuba
description: My project is a Minecraft texture pack called 'Kuba,' featuring a 64-color palette. It offers smooth textures and a relaxing, chill environment for a more immersive and visually soothing gameplay experience.
body: My Minecraft texture pack 'Kuba' utilizes a 64-color palette, which is not listed here. The palette is smooth and carefully curated to create a chill and pleasant environment in the game. This expanded color range allows for more subtle gradients and refined textures, resulting in a more immersive and relaxing visual experience compared to packs with stricter color limitations. The overall vibe is meant to be calm and aesthetically soothing, perfect for players who enjoy a more relaxed atmosphere in their gameplay.
